channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Foreign ministers meet in Italy for the last G7 of the Biden administration
item.description: FIUGGI, Italy (AP) — Foreign ministers from the world’s leading industrialized nations are meeting Monday, with the wars in Ukraine and the Middle East entering decisive phases and a certain pressure to advance diplomatic efforts ahead of the new U.S. administration taking over.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE WINFIELD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Philippine showdown: President says he'll fight vice president's plot to have him killed
item.description: MANILA, Philippines (AP) — Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. on Monday described a public threat by the vice president to have him killed by an assassin as a criminal plot and vowed to fight it, in a looming showdown between the country’s two top leaders.
item.dc:creator: JIM GOMEZ, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: New Zealanders save more than 30 stranded whales by lifting them on sheets
item.description: WELLINGTON, New Zealand (AP) — More than 30 pilot whales that stranded themselves on a beach in New Zealand were safely returned to the ocean after conservation workers and residents helped to refloat them by lifting them on sheets.
item.dc:creator: CHARLOTTE GRAHAM-McLAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Uruguay’s leftist opposition candidate Yamandú Orsi becomes country's new president
item.description: MONTEVIDEO, Uruguay (AP) — Uruguay's leftist opposition candidate, Yamandú Orsi, became the country's new president in a tight runoff Sunday, ousting the conservative governing coalition and making the South American nation the latest to rebuke the incumbent party in a year of landmark elections wor
item.dc:creator: NAYARA BATSCHKE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Charlotte airport workers strike at outset of busy Thanksgiving travel week
item.description: Service workers at Charlotte Douglas International Airport have gone on strike during a busy week of Thanksgiving travel to protest what they say are unlivable wages.
item.dc:creator: Erik Verduzco, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Landslide and flash floods hit Indonesia’s Sumatra island, leaving 16 dead and 6 missing
item.description: KARO, Indonesia (AP) — Rescuers in Indonesia recovered 16 bodies under tons of mud and rocks or that were swept away in flash floods that hit mountainside villages on Sumatra Island, officials said Monday. Six people are still missing, officials said.
item.dc:creator: BINSAR BAKKARA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Salad topping sold in 22 states — including Utah — recalled over wrong ingredient
item.description: The packagers should contain tortilla strips but instead, consumers have found crispy onion strips inside.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, ABC 4

item.title: Donald Trump Jr., Elon Musk joke about purchasing MSNBC
item.description: Musk’s exchange with Trump Jr. is similar to one he had with a Twitter user in 2017 after he was encouraged to purchase the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Chiefs' Patrick Mahomes fined over $14K for 'violent gesture' at Bills game
item.description: The fine comes after the star quarterback celebrated a touchdown pass with a hand gesture that appeared to imitate him holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Walmart executive says some prices might rise if Trump's tariffs take effect
item.description: A Walmart executive warned that President-elect Trump’s plans to raise tariffs on imports could drive the retail giant to increase the price of store items.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: Earth bids farewell to its temporary 'mini moon': What it was, and where it's going
item.description: Currently, more than 2 million miles away, the object is too small and faint to see without a powerful telescope.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: What's behind the doors of this Missouri cave? A former roller rink, concert stage and more
item.description: Adventure awaits at every turn of one captivating cave in suburban St. Louis, now modernized into a quirky and nostalgic getaway with a storied legacy.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Drones detected near 3 US bases in England last week: Air Force
item.description: Between Wednesday and Friday, multiple unidentified drones were detected near RAF Lakenheath, RAF Mildenhall and RAF Feltwell.
item.dc:creator: Elina Shirazi, NewsNation

item.title: Republicans push back against Democrats' claims that Trump intelligence pick Gabbard is compromised
item.description: Republican lawmakers are pushing back against criticism from some Democrats that President-elect Donald Trump’s pick to lead U.S. intelligence services is “compromised” by her comments supportive of Russia and a meeting with an ally of that country.
item.dc:creator: Adriana Gomez Licon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Salad topping sold in Florida, 21 other states recalled over wrong ingredient
item.description: The packagers should contain tortilla strips but instead, consumers have found crispy onion strips inside.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chuck Woolery, former host of 'Wheel of Fortune' and more, dies
item.description: Chuck Woolery, the affable, smooth-talking game show host of “Wheel of Fortune,” “Love Connection” and “Scrabble” who later became a right-wing podcaster, skewering liberals and accusing the government of lying about COVID-19, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Winter storms possible across US during Thanksgiving week, forecasts warn
item.description: Forecasters throughout the U.S. issued warnings that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to the Thanksgiving holiday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A man called 911 for help during a home invasion. Las Vegas police fatally shot him
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A Las Vegas man called for police help during a home invasion before an officer fatally shot him, according to authorities and 911 calls. Brandon Durham called 911 early Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chuck Woolery, smooth-talking game show host of 'Love Connection' and 'Scrabble,' dies at 83
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chuck Woolery, the affable, smooth-talking game show host of “Wheel of Fortune,” “Love Connection” and “Scrabble” who later became a right-wing podcaster, skewering liberals and accusing the government of lying about COVID-19, has died. He was 83.
item.dc:creator: MARK KENNEDY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: You can get paid $2,500 to shop at Costco for a week
item.description: Attention Costco shoppers! How would you like to get paid $2,500 plus a free Costco membership to shop at your favorite store?
item.dc:creator: Jessica Yakubovsky, Fox 5

item.title: Remains of Pennsylvania teen at center of 1973 cold case identified as investigation continues
item.description: Ruth Elizabeth Brenneman was last seen leaving for school more than 50 years ago. Now, her remains have been identified as the investigation into her disappearance continues.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, KRON4

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jussie Smollett refuses to speak the truth, actor's ‘attackers’ say
item.description: In 2021, Smollett was found guilty of five counts of disorderly conduct after it turned out he set up the attack.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, KTLA 5

item.title: Will a winter storm hit the US over Thanksgiving week? Here's what forecasts show so far
item.description: WINDSOR, Calif. (AP) — Forecasters warned over the weekend that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to Thanksgiving in parts of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: GODOFREDO A. VASQUEZ and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fred Harris, former US senator from Oklahoma and presidential hopeful, dies at 94
item.description: Fred Harris, a former U.S. senator from Oklahoma, presidential hopeful and populist who championed Democratic Party reforms in the turbulent 1960s, died Saturday. He was 94. Harris’ wife, Margaret Elliston, confirmed his death to The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RIO YAMAT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dartmouth sorority, fraternity members face charges after death of student, 20, at party
item.description: The drowning death of a 20-year-old student at Dartmouth over the summer after an alcohol-fueled party has led to charges for a sorority and two fraternity members.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump names Seb Gorka, Alex Wong to be senior national security staff
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped his first term alums Alex Wong and Sebastian Gorka to join his national security team for his second go-around.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation
